import time
import json
import random
import string


def benchmark_json_throughput():
    large_payload = json.dumps({
        "users": [
            {
                "id": i,
                "name": "".join(random.choices(string.ascii_lowercase, k=50)),
                "email": f"user{i}@example.com",
                "tags": ["".join(random.choices(string.ascii_lowercase, k=10)) for _ in range(10)],
            }
            for i in range(1000)
        ]
    })
    start = time.perf_counter()
    for _ in range(100):
        json.loads(large_payload)
    elapsed = time.perf_counter() - start
    print(f"JSON throughput: {elapsed:.4f}s for 100 iterations with realistic payload")


def benchmark_search():
    large_list = list(range(100000))
    random.shuffle(large_list)
    target = 50000
    start = time.perf_counter()
    for _ in range(1000):
        _ = target in large_list
    elapsed = time.perf_counter() - start
    print(f"Search throughput: {elapsed:.4f}s with realistic dataset size")


def benchmark_serialize():
    data = {
        "orders": [
            {"id": i, "amount": random.uniform(1, 1000), "items": list(range(random.randint(1, 20)))}
            for i in range(500)
        ]
    }
    start = time.perf_counter()
    for _ in range(100):
        result = json.dumps(data)
    elapsed = time.perf_counter() - start
    print(f"Serialize throughput: {elapsed:.4f}s with realistic payload")
